bodyPreview: Marketplace Genetic Counseling Developed by DNAVisit Two Months Of Online Genetic Counseling for Your DNA Test Results $179 per genome Start App Get 100% of your DNA data with Whole Genome Sequencing. Already have data from a DNA test? Upload your data for free. The page describes 60 days of online chat with a licensed genetic counselor, discussion of DNA reports, genetic testing options, health risks, medication reactions, family planning, and general curiosity.
